// Project 05 of 06

Seafood Expo Taipei — Brand Identity & Booth Strategy

LeQuality Life Co., LTD · 2022–2024

Real Work Experience 2 Years +10% Engagement
Managed end-to-end brand presence at the Seafood Expo Taipei — one of Taiwan's largest B2B/B2C trade shows — over two consecutive years, progressively elevating the brand from a standard booth to a full sensory brand experience.
Year 01

First Exhibition — Establishing Presence

Building the Foundation at Seafood Expo Taipei

Situation
The company's expo presence was inconsistent — no cohesive visual strategy, and the brand wasn't standing out in a crowded trade show environment with hundreds of competing exhibitors.
Task
Take full ownership of brand identity at the expo — from booth visual design to on-floor engagement strategy — to meaningfully increase foot traffic and brand recall.

Photo 01 · Year 1 booth — establishing brand presence at Seafood Expo Taipei

Year 02

Visual Brand Upgrade + Branded Souvenir

Turning Visitors into Brand Ambassadors

Photo 02 · Year 2 booth — upgraded visual identity, premium product display and cohesive brand environment

01
Visual Identity Upgrade
Refined booth aesthetic — premium display, cohesive color palette, upgraded product signage across all touchpoints.
02
Branded Bag Design
Custom-designed navy tote (37×28.5cm) with the brand logo and marine-themed artwork — given as a free gift to incentivize visits.
03
Organic Brand Amplification
Visitors carrying the bag across the expo floor created walking brand presence — driving organic traffic back to our booth.

// Bag Souvenir Design

Photo 03 · Branded tote bag — 37×28.5 cm, navy blue with Lequality Life marine artwork

▸ +10% booth engagement year-over-year · Branded bag generated organic brand exposure across the full expo floor · Strengthened relationships with suppliers and end consumers
